Describe the sequence of items added to the 'YOU WILL NEED' list overlay throughout the video.
canonical_answer: At 12s, the text 'YOU WILL NEED' appears above a bowl of soup; at 14s, 'Watercress soup' and 'Fruit' are listed on the blue overlay; at 16s, 'Skim milk' and 'Fat-free yogurt' are added to the list; at 18s, 'Vegetables' and 'Chicken' complete the ingredient list on screen.
